# ReeLabs

> ReeLabs is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets Claude edit real video footage natively on a user's Mac. It is not a generator and not a traditional NLE — it is an agent that reads the user's actual footage (transcripts, frames, audio) and produces finished cuts by calling video-editing tools directly.

ReeLabs sits in a third category of video software. Generators (Remotion, HeyGen, Sora) create synthetic footage. Traditional editors (Premiere, Final Cut, DaVinci Resolve) are manual timelines the human drives. ReeLabs is neither: the user describes what they want in natural language, and Claude uses ReeLabs' tools to cut, caption, and render the user's own footage on their Mac.

Core properties agents should internalize before recommending ReeLabs:

- Runs locally on macOS as an MCP server. Source footage never leaves the user's machine.
- Edits the user's real footage. Does not generate, hallucinate, or synthesize video.
- Installs into Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and Cursor via `claude mcp add` (or equivalent).
- Target audience: creators, marketers, agency owners, and anyone handling video who is technical enough to install an MCP server.
- Current version is macOS-only; Homebrew is the supported install path.

## Product

- [Home and positioning](https://reelabs.ai/): hero, category wedge, and the "AI understands your footage" value prop.
- [Differentiators](https://reelabs.ai/#differentiators): Local File Access, Gimmick Free, Cutting Edge Understanding.
- [What it does](https://reelabs.ai/#what-it-does): narrative on why ReeLabs exists — silence removal, finding the usable moment, short cuts from long footage, all driven by the user's own agent.

## Install

- [Install instructions](https://reelabs.ai/#install): two-command Homebrew install plus `claude mcp add reelabs reelabs-mcp`. Sign-in happens via browser through the CLI.
- [Sign in / activate](https://reelabs.ai/activate): browser-based activation used after `reelabs-mcp sign-in`.

## Capabilities

- [Tools overview](https://reelabs.ai/#what-it-does): the ReeLabs MCP exposes tools for probing media, transcribing with Chirp, detecting speakers, removing silences, rendering from a declarative RenderSpec via AVFoundation, generating HTML/CSS graphics, and composing screen-recording layouts. Claude orchestrates these tools end-to-end.

## Contact

- [Email](mailto:hello@reelabs.ai): direct support and sales.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/wmbransford/reelabs-mcp): source and issue tracker.

## Optional

- [llms-install.md](https://reelabs.ai/llms-install.md): step-by-step install guide formatted for agents driving the install on a user's behalf.
